_comment: SHA-256 manifest for supply-chain verification. Append a key after smoke-testing a new download; the verifier hard-fails on mismatch for known keys and logs-and-continues for unknown keys.

_format.magisk: key = asset filename returned by GitHub releases (e.g. 'Magisk-v30.7.apk')
_format.cmdlineTools: key = full URL returned by the developer.android.com scrape (or the hard-coded fallback)

_lastVerified.source: Magisk hash cross-checked against GitHub Releases API per-asset 'digest' field. cmdline-tools hash computed from the URL listed on developer.android.com/studio at the same date (Google publishes only SHA-1 in repository2-3.xml; the SHA-256 entry below was independently computed).
